primaryName: FISH Combined Communities Food Closet (Honeoye Falls)

webVerification.sourceLabel: Honeoye Falls FISH Food Closet official site
webVerification.notes: Web confirms (585) 484-7103 as the FISH Combined Communities Food Closet line. ADDRESS CORRECTION: official site lists 33 Monroe Street, Honeoye Falls (programs.js had stale 153 East St — corrected). Serves Honeoye Falls, Mendon, West Bloomfield by appointment only.
